title: lithocardium sebestana
intro: Lithocardium sebestana is a plant-based remedy also known as Lithospermum sebastos. It is a flowering plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular conditions. The plant is said to have diuretic and vasodilatory effects, which can help to reduce blood pressure and improve circulation. It is often used in herbal preparations such as tea and tincture, which can be consumed to promote overall cardiovascular health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Chemistry & biodiversity", lithocardium sebestana benefits, which is actually a part of the Saussurea genus, include relieving internal heat or fever, harmonizing menstruation, invigorating blood circulation, stopping bleeding, alleviating pain, increasing energy, and curing rheumatic arthritis.
